title: Senior SEO Specialist at GKB Opticals International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at GKB Opticals International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at GKB Opticals International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About GKB Opticals International Enterprises:
GKB Opticals International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals International Enterprises!
